scripts.format: biome format --write package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle src
scripts.format:check: biome format package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle src
scripts.lint: biome check package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle src
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --fix package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle src
